content: Listen to “Street Of Dreams” now: https://U2.lnk.to/streetofdreamsID Subscribe to the U2 Channel: https://U2.lnk.to/YTSubscribeID Watch More U2 Videos: https://U2.lnk.to/WatchMoreID Sign Up to the U2 Mailing List: https://U2.lnk.to/MailingListID Become a U2.com Member: https://www.u2.com/subscribe Follow U2 on Socials: Instagram: https://U2.lnk.to/InstagramID Facebook: https://U2.lnk.to/FacebookID TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@u2 Twitter: https://U2.lnk.to/TwitterID Official Website: https://U2.lnk.to/WebsiteID Video credits: Production Company: Somesuch & Co Somesuch Co-founders: Tim Nash & Sally Campbell Directed by Cliqua Executive Producer: Daniella Manca Produced by Roisín Audrey Moloney Head of Production: Georgina Fillmore Agency: Freuds Chairman: Matthew Freud Creative Partner: Stephen Howell Production Service Co. (Gonna fight it) Your trust? (Won't be denied) This bus? (Gonna ride it) To the street of dreams La calle, calle de los sueños Justice, an obsession on the street of dreams La calle, calle de los sueños Love in a procession down the street of dreams Break out Break through Break in Your dream needs you Your life? (Gonna find you) Your fear? (Not gonna blind you) Random angels? (Gonna guide you) To the street of dreams La calle, calle de los sueños All the doors are open on the street of dreams La calle, calle de los sueños Broken are the chosen on the street of dreams Don't you give up on your dream for the many not just the few Don't you give up and your dreams won't give up on you La calle, calle de los sueños Justice an obsession on the street of dreams La calle, calle de los sueños Love in a procession down the street of dreams God hear me shout Lend your ear to my prayer When I'm far from anywhere Down to my last breath of air #U2 #StreetOfDreams
chineseContent: 立即收听“梦想之街”：https://U2.lnk.to/streetofdreamsID 订阅 U2 频道：https://U2.lnk.to/YTSubscribeID 观看更多 U2 视频：https://U2.lnk.to/WatchMoreID 注册 U2 邮件列表：https://U2.lnk.to/MailingListID 成为 U2.com 会员：https://www.u2.com/subscribe U2 社交媒体： Instagram：https://U2.lnk.to/InstagramID Facebook：https://U2.lnk.to/FacebookID TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@u2 Twitter：https://U2.lnk.to/TwitterID 官方网站：https://U2.lnk.to/WebsiteID 视频来源： 制作公司：Somesuch & Co Somesuch 联合创始人：Tim Nash 和 Sally Campbell 由 Cliqua 执行制片人执导： Daniella Manca 制片人：Roisín Audrey Moloney 制作主管：Georgina Fillmore 代理公司：Freuds 主席：Matthew Freud 创意合作伙伴：Stephen Howell Production Service Co. Future Lovers FL EP Ezequiel Avaro FL 管理合伙人 Thomas Amoedo FL 董事总经理 Pia Suárez FL 制片人 Carlos Ayami Erdmann 第一副导演：Matias Boldt 第一副导演影子：Sandra Mayerstein电影摄影师：Norm Li 制作设计：Roberto Bonelli 服装：Leandro Oro 选角：Casing Club Bus 设计艺术家：Chavis Marmol 壁画艺术家：Chanok 活动制作：Peak Studio 现场音频制作：Meridian Pro 由 Zaldy Lopez 编辑 Color Joseph Bicknell 美容 VFX 日落编辑 Beauty VFX EP Nazeli Kodjoian Beauty VFX EP Kevin Filippini 声音设计和混音 Christian Stropko U2 - 'Street Of梦的歌词：上帝听我呼喊，请听我的祈祷，当我远离任何地方，直到我最后一口气时，上帝听我呼喊，请听我祈祷，当我远离任何地方，直到我最后一口气，La calle，calle de los sueños，梦想的街道上所有的门都打开了，La calle，calle de los sueños，破碎的是街上的选择。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
